# ccdash — Knowledge State

CCDash is a dashboard and telemetry platform for tracking Claude Code agent sessions, features, workflows, analytics, and execution context, intended to serve both human operators and coding agents. [source: art_01KTCNK97H1TG58X8HVZQ6H8ZE] Its backend exposes HTTP endpoints across sessions, features, analytics, projects, execution, cache, telemetry, integrations, and codebase exploration, and is moving toward a hexagonal architecture via CorePorts with a centralized RuntimeContainer for composition. [source: art_01KTCNK97H1TG58X8HVZQ6H8ZE] Key typed models include AgentSession, PlanDocument, Project, SessionUsageAggregateResponse, and execution/telemetry DTOs. [source: art_01KTCNK97H1TG58X8HVZQ6H8ZE] CCDash uses an unprefixed frontmatter schema with 62+ fields, including: title (required), doc_type (8-value enum: prd, implementation_plan, phase_plan, progress, report, design_doc, spec, document), a schema_name discriminator set to ccdash_document, a 7-value status enum (pending, in_progress, review, completed, deferred, blocked, archived), temporal fields (created, updated, started, completed), and rich relationship fields including linked_features (typed array with confidence and evidence), linked_sessions, lineage_parent, and lineage_type. [source: art_01KPK96C0CAXDCK0NPPCCX3H7V] A plan exists to expose CCDash intelligence through three delivery channels — REST API, a query-first CLI, and an MCP server — all backed by a shared application query layer under backend/application/services/agent_queries/. [source: art_01KTCNK97H1TG58X8HVZQ6H8ZE] CLI commands are designed to answer high-level questions (e.g. ccdash feature report, ccdash workflow leaderboard, ccdash report aar) with --json and --md output modes for agent and human consumption. [source: art_01KTCNK97H1TG58X8HVZQ6H8ZE] In the context of MeatyWiki integration, CCDash is one of three systems (alongside SAM/SkillMeat and MeatyWiki) sharing document frontmatter; field mapping work (SPIKE 8.4) found direct matches on title, tags, and summary, partial overlaps on status and relationship fields, and MeatyWiki-specific fields with no CCDash equivalent such as verification_status, freshness_class, contradiction_state, and agent_visibility. [source: art_01KPK96C0CAXDCK0NPPCCX3H7V] Within MeatyWiki itself, CCDash hook integration is deferred as F2 — a no-op stub at engine V1.
